docs.github.com/en/rest.search_notes: Found via the official `github/rest-api-description` repo (latest release v2.1.0); `descriptions-next/` contains the OpenAPI 3.1.0 spec (newer than the previously known 3.0.3), while `descriptions/` holds the stable OpenAPI 3.0.3 version — both at API info version 1.1.4.

discord.com/developers/docs/reference.search_notes: Found Discord's official OpenAPI specification repository on GitHub with specs directory containing the API specification files.

developers.docusign.com/docs/admin-api.search_notes: Found the official DocuSign Admin API OpenAPI specs in the official DocuSign OpenAPI-Specifications GitHub repository, with v2.1 being the latest version.

developers.docusign.com/docs/esign-rest-.search_notes: Documentation pages returned minimal content, constructed URLs based on DocuSign's known GitHub OpenAPI repository pattern.

developers.asana.com/reference/rest-api-.search_notes: Found via the official Asana GitHub repository `Asana/openapi`, whose README explicitly names the spec files at `./defs/asana_oas.yaml` (REST API) and `./defs/app_components_oas.yaml` (App Components) on the `master` branch.

developer.candid.org/reference/openapi.search_notes: Found by fetching the Candid OpenAPI index (`https://developer.candid.org/openapi`), identifying "Premier API - v1.0" as the last entry in the list, and confirming its direct JSON URL returns a valid OpenAPI 3.0.1 spec titled "Premier API" covering v1–v4 endpoints.
